calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Evan J. Smith, Esq., of Brodsky Smith, (877) 534-2590, for Plaintiff.

Raymond Muro, Esq., of Norton Rose Fulbright US LLP, 213-892-9200, for Defendant.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Musto. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order and judgment are signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2023 Set For Trial On Mar-03-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
